candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears as a component within the selected parent total 'Cost of goods sold', so adding it separately would double count.
Explicit COGS depreciation component, but it sits as part of the selected parent total 'Cost of goods sold'/'Cost of revenues/COGS', so it is already embedded.
Generic depreciation line is blank and not clearly a separate operating same-level add-on for COGS.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the parent total 'Cost of goods sold'. The visible COGS D&A rows appear to be sub-components of that total, not separate same-level expenses to add later.

candidates.why: This is an explicit depreciation sub-component under the selected parent row 'Selling expenses', so it appears already included and should not be added separately.
This is an explicit depreciation sub-component under the selected parent row 'Administration costs', so it appears already included and should not be added separately.
Potential SG&A D&A summary row, but it is blank in the excerpt and there is no evidence of a separate populated same-level amount to add beyond the selected SG&A parent rows.
Generic depreciation line is blank and not clearly a separate same-level SG&A expense to add.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket consists of parent operating expense rows 'Selling expenses', 'Administration costs', and 'Other operating expenses'. The visible SG&A depreciation rows appear to be embedded sub-components of those selected rows. No separate R&D row is present, and XRD is empty.
